parsed_artifacts.content:
# unowned_tasks packet attempt 3

Resolved ownership for the two unowned SSOT memory.instances tasks by assigning each pipeline register to its behavioral owner module and file via rtl_contract metadata:

- RTL-0141 / memory.instances.id_ex_reg -> rv32i_min_idex (rtl/rv32i_min_idex.sv)
- RTL-0142 / memory.instances.ex_mem_wb_reg -> rv32i_min_memwb (rtl/rv32i_min_memwb.sv)

This packet does not alter locked SSOT semantics. It closes the owner/evidence attribution gap so downstream audit can bind these memory-instance requirements to manifest-owned RTL behavior already covered by module packets.
